name: rei-warden-manager
description: A full-stack web application to manage and monitor [Vaultwarden](https://github.com/dani-garcia/vaultwarden) backups to cloud storage providers via [rclone](https://rclone.org/).

scripts.setup: npm i && npm i --prefix backend && npm i --prefix frontend
scripts.dev:backend: cross-env NODE_ENV=development PORT=3001 nodemon --watch backend backend/server.js
